meaning: adj.完整的,整体的,[数学] 积分的,构成整体所需要的n.[数学] 积分,完整,部分
examples: As an integral part of learning, it brings about positive changes, making people develop and grow.
Materials and methods of construction are integral parts of the design of architecture structures.
All models have an integral CD player.
Stan Lee remains an integral part of the annual San Diego Comic-Con convention.
The gaming mechanics of the app are an integral part of the shopping experience.
